works.name: site-app-scaffold
works.payload: Phase 1: create the initial Next.js App Router, Fumadocs, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Bun, Biome, and Makefile scaffold for the AI model reference website. Include CI-oriented local commands and static docs routing placeholders.

works.name: content-registry-validation
works.payload: Phase 1: implement the minimum structured content baseline needed for one canonical docs page, including TypeScript/Zod schemas, registry loaders, one module record, one tag record, one citation record, colocated message loading, colocated asset loading, and validation.

works.name: docs-template-rendering
works.payload: Phase 1: implement canonical docs rendering for one basic module page, preferably grouped-query attention, using localized message keys, resolved asset references, tag pills, citations, and a minimal derived related-documents section.

works.name: default-pages-search-tags
works.payload: Phase 1: implement the default site pages and discovery surfaces: home/reference entry page, search entry, glossary index, tags index, one attention tag landing page, and basic Fumadocs Orama search for the sample docs page.

works.name: ideafy-loopback-phase-1-default-site-batch-001
works.payload: Review the completed Phase 1 default-site ideas, update factory/internal progress and checklist state, wait for manual confirmation if needed, and prepare the next coherent phase batch.
